scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && esbuild src/chat-runtime-cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/chat-runtime-cli.mjs && esbuild src/native-runtime/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/native-runtime/index.mjs
scripts.test: node --test --import tsx src/gateway.test.ts src/session.test.ts src/runtime-process.test.ts src/chat-runtime.test.ts src/native-runtime.test.ts
